commit.subject: LU-17000 tgt: check 'env' for NULL before using
commit.message:
LU-17000 tgt: check 'env' for NULL before using

Under tgt_add_reply_data() env may be NULL. Check
'env' value before using.

CoverityID: 397929 ("Dereference after null check")
Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Change-Id: I754326d8943ee1ab2606909531f9b2fcd17fd9ec
